description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages: test, build, and triage. In the test stage add a flatpak:test job using the image registry.gitlab.com/remmina/remmina/ubuntu:24.04 that runs apt-get update -qq, apt-get install -y -qq flatpak-builder flatpak build-essential git-core, flatpak --user remote-add --if-not-exists flathub $FLATHUB_REPO, git config --global protocol.file.allow always, caches the flatpak/.flatpak-builder directories, executes /bin/sh -xe ./flatpak/flatpak-build.sh, and publishes flatpak/remmina-dev.flatpak as an artifact for 7 days; it runs only for merge_requests, tags, and web and is excluded for schedules. Also in test add an ubuntu:devel job (default image) that runs apt-get update -qq, apt-get install -y -qq libpcre2-8-0 libpcre2-dev python3 python3-dev, creates $BUILD_FOLDER, runs cmake -B$BUILD_FOLDER -H. $CMAKE_BUILD_OPTIONS, then make VERBOSE=1 -C $BUILD_FOLDER, and runs only for master, tags, merge_requests, and web while excluding schedules. In the build stage add a snap:build job using the image registry.gitlab.com/remmina/remmina/snap:22.04 that runs apt-get update -qq, apt-get install -y git, creates launchpad credentials with a series of echo -en commands, runs snapcraft remote-build --launchpad-accept-public-upload, checks for amd64, arm64, and armhf snap files with conditional shell blocks, and if the branch is master logs into snapcraft and uploads the snap files to the edge channel, producing *.snap and remmina_*.txt artifacts retained for 10 days; it runs only for tags, merge_requests, and web and not for schedules. Also in build add trigger_build and trigger_ppa jobs that install curl, then POST to GitLab trigger pipelines via curl; trigger_build runs on any branch except schedules, while trigger_ppa runs only for tags and web. Finally, add a run:triage job in the triage stage using ruby:3.2 that installs the gitlab-triage gem and executes gitlab-triage with the $RM_TRIAGE_TOKEN, running only on schedules. The pipeline uses a per‑job cache keyed by CI_JOB_NAME with pull‑push policy and defines variables such as BUILD_FOLDER, CMAKE_BUILD_OPTIONS, DEB_PPA, DOCKER_IMAGE, FLATPAK_ARCH, FREERDP_DAILY_PPA, and GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY.
